reviews.author: Alina Y.
reviews.text: Every dish at DoMik is a masterpiece. The flavors are bold, balanced, and deeply satisfying.

reviews.author: Anna Meliksetyan
reviews.text: This is one of the coziest spots in Armenia with intentional, beautiful details throughout.

reviews.author: Diksha R.
reviews.text: The food was above expectations, coming as great comfort in cold weather to our hungry selves.
